page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Human Proteoform Atlas (HPfA) is a web-based repository of experimentally verified human proteoforms and is a direct descendant of the Consortium of Top-Down Proteomics' (CTDP) Proteoform Atlas
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Human Proteoform Atlas (HPfA) is a web-based repository of experimentally verified human proteoforms and is a direct descendant of the Consortium of Top-Down Proteomics' (CTDP) Proteoform Atlas
